title: epidryos micrantherus
intro: Epidryos micrantherus, also known as the small-flowered epidryos or small-flowered club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to certain regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of epidryos micrantherus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and act as an expectorant, which helps in relieving coughs and congestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
